u with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals 12 i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus 3 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top minus 5 k with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top space space d a n space v with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals 4 i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top minus 8 k with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top
